academicYears.setup.title: Academic Year Setup Guide
academicYears.setup.subtitle: Follow these steps in order to set up classes, enrollments, and teaching assignments for a new academic year.
academicYears.setup.step1.title: Create a New Academic Year
academicYears.setup.step1.description: Add the upcoming academic year with its start/end dates and semesters.
academicYears.setup.step2.title: Set the New Year as Active
academicYears.setup.step2.description: Activate the new academic year to make it the target for subsequent setup actions. Active year: {{activeYear}}
academicYears.setup.step3.title: Bulk Create Classes
academicYears.setup.step3.description: Create the grade levels and classrooms for the active year. Total classes created: {{count}}
academicYears.setup.step4.title: Promote / Enroll Students
academicYears.setup.step4.description: Transfer students from their classes in the previous year to the new classes of the active year. Total students enrolled: {{count}}
academicYears.setup.step5.title: Assign Catechists
academicYears.setup.step5.description: Assign homeroom teachers and co-teachers to the classrooms. Total catechists assigned: {{count}}
academicYears.setup.banner.title: Ready to set up a new academic year?
academicYears.setup.banner.description: Use our step-by-step wizard to guide you through creating the year, migrating students, and assigning catechists in the correct order.
academicYears.setup.importTip.title: Looking to import data in bulk?
academicYears.setup.importTip.descriptio: You can import catechists and students from Excel/CSV files directly using our import tool.
